agent.name: Blue Agent
agent.description: Base-native AI agent for builders — idea, build, audit, ship, raise. Grounded in real Base knowledge. Powered by Bankr LLM.

x402.note: Any x402-capable agent can call a tool endpoint and pay per call in USDC — no API key. See catalog for the full list, prices, and input schemas.

skills.name: blue_idea
skills.description: Turn a rough concept into a fundable brief — problem, why now, why Base, MVP scope, risks, 24h plan.

skills.name: blue_build
skills.description: Architecture, stack, folder structure, integrations, and test plan.

skills.name: blue_audit
skills.description: Security and product risk review — critical issues, suggested fixes, go/no-go.

skills.name: blue_ship
skills.description: Deployment checklist, verification steps, release notes, monitoring plan.

skills.name: blue_raise
skills.description: Pitch narrative — market framing, why this wins, traction, ask, target investors.

skills.name: blue_score
skills.description: Builder Score for a Base wallet or Farcaster handle — onchain reputation at a glance.
